member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.BackgroundJobs.ClinicBackgroundJobs.MarkNoShowAppointmentsAsync
member.summary: Daily: flag appointments as NoShow if past + still Confirmed/Scheduled.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.BackgroundJobs.ClinicBackgroundJobs.CheckLowStockAsync
member.summary: Daily: send low-stock alert notifications (SignalR push to Admin/Doctor/Nurse).

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.BackgroundJobs.ClinicBackgroundJobs.VoidStaleInvoicesAsync
member.summary: Daily: auto-void invoices AwaitingPayment older than 30 days.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.BackgroundJobs.ClinicBackgroundJobs.PurgeOldAuditLogsAsync
member.summary: Weekly: purge audit logs older than 2 years.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.BackgroundJobs.ClinicBackgroundJobs.SendScheduledReportsAsync
member.summary: Daily at 7:30 AM: email yesterday's revenue summary to clinic admin.
Get appointments with optional filters.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AppointmentsController.Create(HospitalApp.Core.Application.Features.Appointments.DTOs.CreateAppointmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Schedule a new appointment.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AppointmentsController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.UpdateAppointmentStatusRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Update appointment status (confirm, cancel, no-show, complete).

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuditController.GetLogs(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Query audit log with optional filters. Admin only.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Login(HospitalApp.Core.Application.Features.Auth.DTOs.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticate and receive JWT access token. Refresh token set as HTTP-only cookie.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Register(HospitalApp.Core.Application.Features.Auth.DTOs.RegisterRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register a new user (Admin only).

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Refresh(HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Refresh access token using HTTP-only cookie (falls back to body).

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Revoke(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revoke the current user's refresh token and clear cookie.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.TotpSetup(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generate TOTP secret and QR code URI (first step of 2FA setup).

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.TotpEnable(HospitalApp.Core.Application.Features.Auth.DTOs.EnableTotpRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Confirm TOTP code and enable 2FA for the current user.

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.TotpDisable(HospitalApp.Core.Application.Features.Auth.DTOs.DisableTotpRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disable 2FA (requires current password confirmation).

member.name: M:HospitalApp.WebAPI.Controllers.v1.AuthController.TotpLogin(HospitalApp.Core.Application.Features.Auth.DTOs.LoginWithTotpRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Complete login when 2FA is required (email + password + TOTP code).
